sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55990" key="katoia/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατοιάδες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄϊς</etym>) <sense id="n55990.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leading the sheep</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἶγες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:13:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.13.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
